description: Take casual dressing to the next level with this leather shoe from red tape. The full grain leather lends it a natural finish while the stitch detailing enhances your style quotient making casual dressing all the more fun.UpperFull-grain leather upper for absolute comfort, durability and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and tongue for all-day comfortFabric inner lining for ultimate breathable comfortMidsoleErgonomically padded fabric foot-bed for sweat-free comfortPU mid-sole for lightweight comfort and shock absorptionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves strategically created for absolute grip and tractionShoe careUse a branded leather conditioner and brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
